# opnsense_ipsec_local (Resource)

Manages an IPsec (swanctl) local authentication round on OPNsense. A local entry defines how this side authenticates within a connection.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `connection_id` (String) UUID of the IPsec connection this entry belongs to.

### Optional

- `auth` (String) Authentication method: `psk`, `pubkey`, `eap-tls`, `eap-mschapv2`, `xauth-pam`, or `eap-radius`. Defaults to `psk`.
- `certs` (Set of String) UUIDs of certificates used for authentication.
- `description` (String) Description of the local authentication entry.
- `eap_id` (String) EAP identity, when an EAP authentication method is used.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether this local authentication entry is enabled. Defaults to `true`.
- `identity` (String) Local IKE identity (the `id` value sent to the peer).
- `round` (Number) Authentication round (0 = first/default).

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) UUID of the local authentication entry in OPNsense.
